actionCalls.name: Log_Error_Getting_Lab_Order_matching_kit_id
actionCalls.label: Log Error Getting Lab Order matching kit id

value.stringValue: Error Getting Lab Order with matching kit id
Error on Lab Order set to false from null
Autolaunch - Opportunity - Submit Lab Order Request - Opportunity Flow Started

actionCalls.name: Log_Info_Error_Creating_Lab_Order
actionCalls.label: Log Info Error Creating Lab Order

value.stringValue: There was an Error Creating Lab Order. Please submit a help desk ticket for assistance.

actionCalls.name: Log_Kit_Id_Exists_on_Another_Opportunity
actionCalls.label: Log - Kit Id Exists on Another Opportunity

value.stringValue: There is an existing Lab Order with the Kit Id: {!rec_Opportunity.Kit_Id__c}
Kit Id Not Null. Getting Lab Order with matching Kit Id
No Lab Orders with Matching Kit Id found
Lab Order is Rejected. Kit Id on the Opportunity has been cleared

assignments.description: We will now use the name of the lab order as the request id. We store it in this field in case we need to manipulate it for any reason in the future.
assignments.name: Set_Lab_Order_Request_Id
assignments.label: Set Lab Order Request Id

assignments.description: Can't be handled in transform needs to be done via assignment
assignments.name: Set_Lab_Provider_on_Lab_Order
assignments.label: Set Lab Provider on Lab Order

assignments.name: Set_Success_False_Getting_Lab_Orders
assignments.label: Set Success = False - Getting Lab Orders

value.stringValue: Failed to get Lab Order with kit id: {!rec_Opportunity.Kit_Id__c}. See Logs for details.

assignments.name: Set_Success_False_Getting_New_Lab_Order
assignments.label: Set Success = False - Getting New Lab Order

value.stringValue: Failed to get new Lab Order. See Logs for details.

decisions.name: Does_Is_Error_null
decisions.label: Does Is Error = null
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: Error is set to a valid value

decisions.description: The Kit Id can not exist on more than one Lab Order. If there is another Opportunity with that Kit Id then we can't create the lab order.
decisions.name: Does_Lab_Order_Exist_Check_Kit_Id
decisions.label: Does Lab Order Exist - Check Kit Id
decisions.defaultConnectorLabel: No Other Lab Orders Have this Kit Id

rules.name: Kit_Id_Exists_on_Another_Lab_Order
rules.label: Kit Id Exists on Another Lab Order

decisions.description: If the Kit Id is Null we can skip the SOQL query
decisions.name: Is_Kit_Id_Null
decisions.label: Is Kit Id Null

decisions.description: If this is a rejection, then we don't want to set the Kit Id, else we keep the kit id there
decisions.name: Is_Rejection
decisions.label: Is Rejection

decisions.description: Check if the Parent Opportunity record has an address validation error
decisions.name: Is_there_an_address_validation_error_on_the_Opportunity
decisions.label: Is there an address validation error on the Opportunity

Flow.description: This flow is the flow that will CREATE the Lab Order and submit to the Lab API.
Flow.interviewLabel: Autolaunch - Opportunity - Submit Lab Order Request - Opportunity {!$Flow.CurrentDateTime}
Flow.label: Autolaunch - Opportunity - Submit Lab Order Request - Opportunity

recordLookups.description: We need to get the lab order because the Name is the request id and we need to set this.
recordLookups.name: Get_Lab_Order
recordLookups.label: Get Lab Order

recordLookups.name: Get_Lab_Order_Where_Kit_Id
recordLookups.label: Get Lab Order Where Kit Id

textTemplates.name: txt_addressValidationError

value.formulaExpression: CASE( LOWER({!rec_Opportunity.Shipping_Country__c}), "united states", "US", "united states of america", "US", "usa", "US", "u.s.a.", "US", "u.s.", "US", "us of a", "US", "amerika", "US", "america", "US", "united states america", "US", "us america", "US", "us territory", "US", "us mainland", "US", "states", "US", "the states", "US", "canada", "CA", "ca", "CA", "cda", "CA", "can", "CA", "canuck land", "CA", "great white north", "CA", "quebec", "CA", "ontario", "CA", "mexico", "MX", "méxico", "MX", "mex", "MX", "mx", "MX", "méjico", "MX", {!rec_Opportunity.Shipping_Country__c} )

CASE( LOWER({!rec_Opportunity.Shipping_State__c}), "alabama", "AL", "alaska", "AK", "arizona", "AZ", "arkansas", "AR", "california", "CA", "colorado", "CO", "connecticut", "CT", "delaware", "DE", "florida", "FL", "georgia", "GA", "hawaii", "HI", "idaho", "ID", "illinois", "IL", "indiana", "IN", "iowa", "IA", "kansas", "KS", "kentucky", "KY", "louisiana", "LA", "maine", "ME", "maryland", "MD", "massachusetts", "MA", "michigan", "MI", "minnesota", "MN", "mississippi", "MS", "missouri", "MO", "montana", "MT", "nebraska", "NE", "nevada", "NV", "new hampshire", "NH", "new jersey", "NJ", "new mexico", "NM", "new york", "NY", "north carolina", "NC", "north dakota", "ND", "ohio", "OH", "oklahoma", "OK", "oregon", "OR", "pennsylvania", "PA", "rhode island", "RI", "south carolina", "SC", "south dakota", "SD", "tennessee", "TN", "texas", "TX", "utah", "UT", "vermont", "VT", "virginia", "VA", "washington", "WA", "west virginia", "WV", "wisconsin", "WI", "wyoming", "WY", {!rec_Opportunity.Shipping_State__c} )

IF( ISBLANK( MID({!rec_OpportunityLineItem.Customer_Name_GT__c}, FIND(" ", {!rec_OpportunityLineItem.Customer_Name_GT__c}) + 1, LEN({!rec_OpportunityLineItem.Customer_Name_GT__c}) - FIND(" ", {!rec_OpportunityLineItem.Customer_Name_GT__c})) ), {!form_txtAccountLastName}, MID({!rec_OpportunityLineItem.Customer_Name_GT__c}, FIND(" ", {!rec_OpportunityLineItem.Customer_Name_GT__c}) + 1, LEN({!rec_OpportunityLineItem.Customer_Name_GT__c}) - FIND(" ", {!rec_OpportunityLineItem.Customer_Name_GT__c})) )

variables.description: Sets the flag on the Lab Order to be created
variables.name: bool_DoNotSendEmail

variables.description: OpportunityLineItem belonging to the Opportunity that triggered Lab Order creation. This is passed in, and we use it to extract Customer Demographic Data
variables.name: rec_OpportunityLineItem

variables.description: This can be used as a part of the ingest to allow creation of the lab order simpiler
variables.name: txt_ServicesRendered
